rationale: C explicitly names the listener's expectation ('I know you want me to explain'); A and B are pure self-disclosure with B being most internally absorbed.

A redirects toward shared conversation ('can we talk about'). B addresses listener sarcastically ('Happy?'). C just narrates without listener orientation.
